part.text:
---
## Goal
- Move session cleanup job logic from `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/servers/controller` to `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/session` package across entire repository

## Constraints & Preferences
- Task complete when change applied everywhere and project typechecks
- Must preserve functionality: TestSessionConnectionCleanupJob, TestSessionConnectionCleanupJobNewJobErr, newSessionConnectionCleanupJob, sessionConnectionCleanupJob

## Progress
### Done
- Identified all symbols in controller package via code search
- Found source files:
  - /boundary/internal/servers/controller/controller.go (registerSessionConnectionCleanupJob method)
  - /boundary/internal/servers/controller/session_cleanup_job.go (sessionConnectionCleanupJob type, newSessionConnectionCleanupJob func)
  - /boundary/internal/servers/controller/session_cleanup_job_test.go (test functions)
- Confirmed target package already has ConnectionRepository available

### In Progress
- Beginning migration of session cleanup job code to internal/session package

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Move entire type and its methods (Run method on sessionConnectionCleanupJob) as single unit
- Rename symbols appropriately for new package context
- Maintain test coverage in controller package by calling updated imports from session package

## Next Steps
- Create /boundary/internal/session/session_cleanup_job.go with:
  - sessionConnectionCleanupJob type definition
  - newSessionConnectionCleanupJob function
  - Run method implementation
  - TestSessionConnectionCleanupJob test
  - TestSessionConnectionCleanupJobNewJobErr test
- Update /boundary/internal/servers/controller/controller.go to call functions from internal/session package
- Verify typechecks pass

## Critical Context
- The sessionConnectionCleanupJob.Run method calls ConnectionRepository.CloseConnectionsForDeadWorkers
- NewPackage needs connectionRepo factory pattern with grace period validation for DeadWorkerConnCloseMinGrace
- Tests use db.TestWrapper and require specific setup patterns for worker sessions

## Relevant Files
- /boundary/internal/servers/controller/session_cleanup_job.go: source of type and constructors to move
- /boundary/internal/servers/controller/controller.go: caller that needs updated imports
- /boundary/internal/servers/controller/session_cleanup_job_test.go: tests to move
- /boundary/internal/session/repository_connection.go: target package with ConnectionRepository for future integration

part.text:
---
## Goal
- Move session cleanup job logic from `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/servers/controller` to `github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/session` package across entire repository

## Constraints & Preferences
- Task complete when change applied everywhere and project typechecks
- Must preserve functionality: TestSessionConnectionCleanupJob, TestSessionConnectionCleanupJobNewJobErr, newSessionConnectionCleanupJob, sessionConnectionCleanupJob

## Progress
### Done
- Identified all symbols in controller package via code search
- Found source files:
  - /boundary/internal/servers/controller/controller.go (registerSessionConnectionCleanupJob method)
  - /boundary/internal/servers/controller/session_cleanup_job.go (sessionConnectionCleanupJob type, newSessionConnectionCleanupJob func)
  - /boundary/internal/servers/controller/session_cleanup_job_test.go (test functions)
- Confirmed target package already has ConnectionRepository available

### In Progress
- None (previous migration attempts failed due to tool errors after context compaction)

### Blocked
- Context was compacted and media files removed, losing work state

## Key Decisions
- Move entire type and its methods (Run method on sessionConnectionCleanupJob) as single unit
- Rename symbols appropriately for new package context
- Maintain test coverage in controller package by calling updated imports from session package

## Next Steps
- Create /boundary/internal/session/session_cleanup_job.go with:
  - sessionConnectionCleanupJob type definition
  - newSessionConnectionCleanupJob function
  - Run method implementation
  - TestSessionConnectionCleanupJob test
  - TestSessionConnectionCleanupJobNewJobErr test
- Update /boundary/internal/servers/controller/controller.go to call functions from internal/session package
- Verify typechecks pass

## Critical Context
- The sessionConnectionCleanupJob.Run method calls ConnectionRepository.CloseConnectionsForDeadWorkers
- NewPackage needs connectionRepo factory pattern with grace period validation for DeadWorkerConnCloseMinGrace
- Tests use db.TestWrapper and require specific setup patterns for worker sessions

## Relevant Files
- /boundary/internal/servers/controller/session_cleanup_job.go: source of type and constructors to move
- /boundary/internal/servers/controller/controller.go: caller that needs updated imports
- /boundary/internal/servers/controller/session_cleanup_job_test.go: tests to move
- /boundary/internal/session/repository_connection.go: target package with ConnectionRepository for future integration
---
